goal: 做一个本地优先的密码测试工具
purpose: Validate fuzzy-goal expansion, local privacy constraints, implementation, verification, and final reporting.
expected_capabilities: Expands the vague password-tool goal into privacy-safe requirements.
Creates at least one runnable local artifact.
Includes a clear limitation that password strength does not prove absolute security.
Runs local verification before final reporting.
acceptance: GoalSpec contains local-first or privacy-safe constraints.
Task plan contains at least one implementation task and one verification path.
Final report lists produced artifacts and cost summary.
No network access is required by default.
recommended_command: agent /run "做一个本地优先的密码测试工具" --root <workspace>
